name: Delete CloudTrail Logs via S3 Lifecycle Rule
description: Simulates an attacker adding a 1-day S3 lifecycle expiration rule on the CloudTrail log bucket, causing all historical and future logs to be automatically deleted within 24 hours.
prerequisites: CloudTrail trail (stratus-red-team-ct-lifecycle-trail) with associated S3 bucket
detection_signal: s3:PutBucketLifecycleConfiguration on a bucket storing CloudTrail logs, especially with short expiration periods
